testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Access Cart Without Auth
testCases.notes: Guest users can navigate to /cart without authentication. Cart page loads. Guest users see cart with product list. Authentication not required for cart viewing.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Sign-In Required for Checkout
testCases.notes: When attempting checkout as guest: /cart requires authenticated session for B2B store. Sign-in link visible for unauthenticated users. B2B store enforces authentication before checkout.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Register Option from Cart
testCases.notes: Sign-up option accessible from /sign-in page (reached from cart checkout). Registration link present in auth flow. Users can register to proceed with checkout.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Cart Persists After Login
testCases.notes: Guest cart merges with authenticated cart on login. Per Suite 030 (Cart Merge): items added as guest should appear after sign-in. Server-side cart management handles merge.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Guest Cart State (No Auth Token)
testCases.notes: Without auth token: localStorage has no access_token. Cart state maintained via session/anonymous token. Anonymous cart creation via xAPI.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Registration Then Checkout
testCases.notes: New registration (AUTH-002/SMK-002): smoke-smk002-1777882336279@test-agent.com registered successfully. After registration: redirected to /successful-registration. Can proceed to checkout with new account.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Sign-In From Cart Redirect
testCases.notes: Unauthenticated access to checkout flow redirects to /sign-in. After sign-in: returns to checkout context. Auth flow integrates with checkout continuation.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Address Entry for Guest
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Testing address entry for guest checkout requires signing out (disrupts B2B session) and accessing cart as unauthenticated user. Deferred.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Payment for Guest
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Guest payment flow requires completing guest checkout. B2B store requires auth. Guest payment testing deferred.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Order Confirmation for Guest
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Guest order confirmation requires guest checkout completion.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — B2B Store Guest Restrictions
testCases.notes: B2B store configuration: guest checkout may be restricted. B2B store shows Sign-In and Register options (no 'Continue as guest' button visible). Authentication enforced for B2B purchasing.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Homepage and Catalog Accessible to Guest
testCases.notes: Homepage (/), Catalog (/catalog), Search (/search), PDP all accessible without authentication. Only checkout/account pages require sign-in. SMK-001 verified homepage loads for all users.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — B2B Features Hidden for Guest
testCases.notes: Guest users (not authenticated) don't see: AGENT-TEST-Org-BuildRight org indicator, Company members, Quote requests, B2B navigation. B2B features require org auth. Navigation adapts to auth state.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Sign-In Form for Guest Checkout
testCases.notes: /sign-in page: email input (data-test-id=email-input), password input (data-test-id=password-input), sign-in button. SSO options (Entra ID, Google). Error alert (data-test-id=sign-in-error-alert). Verified in AUTH-019/020.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Forgot Password from Guest Checkout
testCases.notes: Forgot password link accessible from /sign-in (also reachable during guest checkout flow). /forgot-password shows email input + Submit. Same flow as authenticated forgot password (AUTH-052).

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — SSO for Guest Checkout
testCases.notes: 'Sign in with Entra ID' and 'Sign in with Google' buttons visible on /sign-in reached from guest checkout flow. SSO available as authentication option for guest-to-authenticated checkout.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Session After Guest Registration
testCases.notes: After registration (smoke-smk002): redirected to /successful-registration. Session established with new account. Can proceed to authenticated checkout. New account created via sign-up form.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Email Verification Post-Registration
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Email verification for new guest-registrant requires admin notification access. Per project memory: QA email verification via Admin Security > User > Resend. Cannot automate in browser-only mode.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Add to Cart as Guest
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Adding to cart as unauthenticated user requires sign-out. Cart badge and PDP add-to-cart verified for authenticated user in SMK-008.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout — Cart Merge After Sign-In
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Cart merge testing (guest items + authenticated items) requires sign-out then add items then sign-in. Deferred to Suite 030. Active B2B session preserved.
